_meta.purpose: Hard free-tier limits the system is bound by. Later rate-limiting and degradation logic MUST read budgets from this file, not hardcode them. Re-verify before deploy day; provider terms change.
_meta.verification: Values marked source_type=official come from provider docs fetched 2026-07-10; secondary = consistent recent third-party sources where official docs no longer publish numbers (Gemini moved exact quotas into the per-project AI Studio dashboard). Confirm Gemini numbers in AI Studio when the API key is created.

hosting_render_free.on_hours_exhausted: ALL free services in workspace suspended until next calendar month

postgres_neon_free.cu_hours_note: 100 CU-hours ~= 400 hours of the 0.25 CU compute; 24/7 always-on is NOT possible, autosuspend is mandatory
postgres_neon_free.on_storage_exceeded: inserts/updates/deletes FAIL until space freed or upgrade; data not deleted
postgres_neon_free.on_compute_exhausted: compute SUSPENDED (database unreachable) until next billing period

redis_upstash_free.on_limit_exceeded: database rate-limited (throttled), email notification; auto-upgrade to paid only if explicitly enabled

vector_faiss_in_process.external_limits: none - bounded only by app instance RAM
vector_faiss_in_process.caveat: Render free disk is EPHEMERAL: index files do not survive restarts and must be fetched from object storage (or rebuilt) at boot

object_storage_r2_free.provider: Cloudflare R2 (free tier) - index artifact store
object_storage_r2_free.on_limit_exceeded: billed overage (requires card on file to enable R2 at all)
object_storage_r2_free.no_card_fallback: Backblaze B2 (10GB free, no card) or Supabase Storage (1GB free)

llm_gemini_free.primary_note: DASHBOARD-VERIFIED 2026-07-13 in this project's AI Studio rate-limit view: 15 RPM / 250K TPM / 500 RPD. Public secondary sources claim 1000 RPD; this project's actual tier is more restricted — dashboard numbers win per Stage 2.5 methodology. Enforced at 0.9 margin: 13 RPM / 450 RPD. Model ID + free availability from official pricing page.

gemini-2.5-flash.note: dashboard-verified 2026-07-13 (public docs said 10/250); RPD already exceeded (22/20) in this project

gemini-2.5-flash-lite.note: UNAVAILABLE to new users as of 2026-07-13 (prod 404: 'no longer available to new users'); entry kept for tests/history

llm_gemini_free.removed_2026_07_13: prior primary 'gemini-3-flash' was never a valid API model ID (actual ID gemini-3-flash-preview, preview-only per pricing page); gemini-2.0-flash-lite is shut down
llm_gemini_free.quota_scope: per Google Cloud project (multiple API keys share quota)
llm_gemini_free.on_quota_exhausted: HTTP 429, error status RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED, includes retry-after guidance
llm_gemini_free.source_type: secondary (Google now shows exact per-project quotas only in AI Studio dashboard; 429/RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED behavior is official). MUST confirm in AI Studio at key creation

llm_groq_free_fallback.provider: Groq API (free tier) - secondary LLM provider
